source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260520 우크라이나(Licarno) 23G, P1 - 이창민 팀장님/260602 추가 제출본/QMS/AQP707 Product Software Validation Regulation/AQP707_Product Software Validation Regulation.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: AQP707 defines product software validation requirements for software design control, verification, validation, testing, design changes, and version management.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used by quality assurance managers and product managers to manage software development activities throughout the project lifecycle.
keyPoints: The regulation applies to software development processes and activities employed by the company.
The regulation outlines requirements for software design control, verification, and validation.
Revision 4 changed the document name and number from Computer Software Validation Regulation (AQP717) to Product Software Validation Regulation (AQP707).
Revision 4 states comprehensive revision to comply with KGMP, EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 requirements.
Software versions are recorded and managed in the Software Version Management Register (707-2).

concepts.name: Medical Software
concepts.evidence: Software developed for use as a medical device, including standalone software, embedded software, and mobile medical apps

concepts.name: Standalone Software
concepts.evidence: Medical device software that has functions that are suitable for the purpose of use of the medical device as a software itself and operates in an environment equivalent to a general-purpose computer

concepts.name: Embedded Software
concepts.evidence: Medical device software that is embedded and operated within a separate medical device system

concepts.name: Commercial Software
concepts.evidence: Software that has already been developed and commercialized separately from medical device software

concepts.name: Validation
concepts.evidence: The act of verifying and documenting that an operation, process, machine, material, operation, or system actually produces the expected results

concepts.name: Revalidation
concepts.evidence: Validation conducted when changes that may affect quality are made to raw materials, manufacturing processes, machinery, or manufacturing systems

concepts.name: Verification
concepts.evidence: Confirming that specific requirements have been met by providing objective evidence

concepts.name: Software Version Management
concepts.evidence: Software versions are recorded and managed in the Software Version Management Register (707-2).

evidence.claim: The document is a controlled Product Software Validation Regulation with document number AQP707.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Software Validation Regulation Document No AQP707 Revision date 2024.04.01. Rev. No 4

evidence.claim: The document aims to support general design control requirements throughout the product development process.
evidence.evidenceText: This standard aims to integrate and support general design control requirements throughout the product development process.

evidence.claim: The regulation defines company software development processes and activities.
evidence.evidenceText: This regulation defines the software development processes and activities employed by our company.

evidence.claim: The regulation outlines requirements for software design control, verification, and validation.
evidence.evidenceText: To ensure software quality, this regulation outlines requirements for software design control, verification, and validation.

evidence.claim: Revision 4 changed the document name and number from AQP717 to AQP707.
evidence.evidenceText: Change in document name and number Computer Software Validation Regulation (AQP717) → Product Software Validation Regulation (AQP707)

evidence.claim: Revision 4 states compliance alignment with KGMP, EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10.
evidence.evidenceText: Comprehensive revision to comply with KGMP, EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 requirements

evidence.claim: The CEO approves protocols and reports.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.1 CEO 1) Approval of protocol and report

evidence.claim: The Development Team Leader is responsible for project planning, implementation, validation, protocol and report preparation, and validation activities.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.2 Development Team Leader 1) Overall planning, implementation, and validation of the project 2) Protocol and report preparation 3) Validation activities

evidence.claim: Software testing includes test plans, integrated testing, and system testing.
evidence.evidenceText: 5.3 Software Testing 5.3.1 Software Test Plan 5.3.2 Integrated Testing 5.3.3 System Testing

evidence.claim: System testing is the final testing before the developed product is provided to users.
evidence.evidenceText: System testing is the final testing performed before the developed product is provided to users.

evidence.claim: Software version number 1.0.0.0 is assigned as the initial version number when first transferred after development completion.
evidence.evidenceText: The version number is assigned as version 1.0.0.0 as the initial version number when first transferred after development is completed.

evidence.claim: Software Validation Report 707-1 and Software Version Control Register 707-2 are retained by the Development Team for 10 years.
evidence.evidenceText: Software Validation Report 707-1 Development Team 10 years; Software Version Control Register 707-2 Development Team 10 years

reviewFlags.reason: No product model is identified in the source text; productModels is empty.
The source is an internal company regulation and cites multiple regulatory frameworks; no single issuing authority is stated.
Some OCR or source text quality issues are present, including 'This document is effective from the date of appro.' and the company name rendered as 'H&abyz'.
